summary: Video of DOL's National Apprenticeship Week set to music, with fast cuts and ALL-CAPS text overlays. It shows a packed conference hall, apprentices at a laptop with a BuildWithin screen, a group photo, and Acting Secretary Sonderling at a podium lined with flags. A voiceover states Trump's 'one million active apprentices' goal and ends on 'making America skilled again.'

script.scene: Opening over event footage; bold red banner 'NATIONAL APPRENTICESHIP WEEK / APRIL 26 - MAY 2, 2026' across a wide shot of a packed conference hall with a speaker at the front podium; music; VO: 'Last week at the Department of Labor, we celebrated National Apprenticeship Week.'
Caption 'CHARGING TOWARD PRESIDENT [TRUMP'S GOAL]' over event footage; VO: 'We're charging toward President Trump's goal of one million active apprentices and the progress is undeniable.'

Footage of two apprentices at a laptop in front of a screen reading 'Welcome to BuildWithin's Apprenticeship Celebration'; overlay 'ACROSS AMERICA, REGISTERED APPRENTICESHIPS'; VO: 'Across America, registered apprenticeships are changing lives.'
Large group photo of officials and apprentices on stage with flags; overlay 'IN-DEMAND CAREERS FAST.'; VO: 'Launching workers into high-paying, in-demand careers fast.'

Darkened, color graded wide shot of Acting Secretary Sonderling at a podium lined with flags, officials seated; caption 'SKILLED AGAIN!'; VO: 'Under the Trump administration, we're making America skilled again.'

notable_text: NATIONAL APPRENTICESHIP WEEK APRIL 26 - MAY 2, 2026; CHARGING TOWARD PRESIDENT TRUMP'S [GOAL]; ACROSS AMERICA, REGISTERED APPRENTICESHIPS; IN-DEMAND CAREERS FAST.; SKILLED AGAIN!
